text: {"type":"FLIP_CARD","title":"Key Terms in Applying Knowledge","lessonText":"Review these key terms to reinforce your understanding of gang culture.","data":{"cards":[{"front":"Street Gangs","back":"Groups involved in local criminal activities and turf wars.","icon":"local_police","imageUrl":""},{"front":"Turf Wars","back":"Conflicts between gangs over control of a specific geographic area.","icon":"flag","imageUrl":""},{"front":"Criminal Activities","back":"Illegal actions committed by gang members, such as drug trafficking or theft.","icon":"report","imageUrl":""},{"front":"Identifying Types of Gangs","back":"The process of distinguishing between different categories of gangs based on their activities and characteristics.","icon":"search","imageUrl":""},{"front":"Gang Culture","back":"The social norms, values, and behaviors associated with gang membership.","icon":"group","imageUrl":""},{"front":"Recruitment","back":"The process by which gangs attract and initiate new members.","icon":"person_add","imageUrl":""},{"front":"Gang Violence","back":"Violent acts committed by or against gang members, often used to assert dominance or control.","icon":"warning","imageUrl":""},{"front":"Gang Territory","back":"Specific areas that gangs claim as their own, often marked by graffiti or other symbols.","icon":"map","imageUrl":""}]}}
